headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill: Robust Financials, Healthy Balance Sheet, Reaffirm Buy
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill remains a Buy, supported by robust financials, a healthy balance sheet, and continued domestic and international expansion. Learn more about CMG stock here.
